merge_presets.label: Angular + TypeScript
merge_presets.value:
- Frontend: Angular 18+ with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS or Angular Material
- State: NgRx or Signals
- Testing: Jasmine + Karma

merge_presets.label: Angular style guide
merge_presets.value:
- Follow Angular style guide strictly.
- Use reactive forms (FormBuilder) over template-driven forms.
- Prefer OnPush change detection.
- Use standalone components.
